📊 WIP Invoice Push Demo

Calculate and push Work-in-Progress invoices to Sage One or Xero

ℹ️ How It Works

  1. 1.View WIP calculations for your projects
  2. 2.Select your ERP system (Sage or Xero)
  3. 3.Click "Push WIP Invoice"
  4. 4.Invoice automatically created in your ERP
  5. 5.See success message with "invoice ID"

✨ Features

  • ✅Real-time WIP calculation
  • ✅Sage One & Xero integration
  • ✅Automatic invoice creation
  • ✅Retention tracking
  • ✅Real-time status feedback

📋 Sample Projects

1

Foundation Works - Phase 2

💼 WIP Invoice Push

Contract Value

R1,200,000.00

Progress

62%

Billed to Date

R650,000.00

Retention

10%

Earned Value (Contract × Progress)R744,000.00
WIP (Earned - Billed)R94,000.00
Retention AmountR9,400.00
Net ClaimableR84,600.00

Plumbing & Fixtures

Contract Value

R320,000.00

Progress

85%

Billed to Date

R250,000.00

Retention

10%

Earned Value (Contract × Progress)R272,000.00
WIP (Earned - Billed)R22,000.00
Retention AmountR2,200.00
Net ClaimableR19,800.00

🔌 API Reference

POST /api/invoices/push-to-erp

Request Body:
{
  "erp": "sage" | "xero",
  "wipAmount": 94400,
  "retentionAmount": 9440,
  "netClaimable": 84960,
  "customerId": "CUST-001",
  "projectName": "Foundation Works - Phase 2",
  "description": "WIP Invoice - Monthly",
  "sageToken": "...",
  "sageCookie": "...",
  "xeroAccessToken": "...",
  "xeroTenantId": "..."
}

Response (Success):
{
  "success": true,
  "erp": "sage",
  "invoiceId": "INV-2024-001",
  "message": "WIP invoice pushed to Sage One",
  "details": {
    "wipAmount": 94400,
    "retentionAmount": 9440,
    "netClaimable": 84960
  }
}
View Real Invoices Dashboard →
